name: Cherry Cheesecake Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the graham cracker crumbs, 1/4 cup of the sugar, and butter. Press into a 13 x 9 inch baking pan.
2. Bake at 325°F for 10 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the cream cheese, remaining 3/4 cup sugar, and vanilla with an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended.
4. Add eggs; mix just until blended.
5. Pour the mixture over the crust.
6. Bake at 325°F for 35 minutes or until the center is almost set. Cool.
7. Refrigerate for 3 hours or overnight.
8. Top with cherry pie filling.
9. Cut into squares.
10. Garnish, if desired. Makes 18 servings. Prep time: 20 minutes plus refrigerating. Baking time: 35 minutes.
